observed: The Document Settings dialog opened successfully with the heading 'Document Settings'. The Date Format combobox was clicked and a scrollable listbox appeared showing 22 date format options including 'YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm AM/PM', 'DD/MM/YYYY HH:mm' (currently selected), 'ISO 8601', and others. The dropdown list is visible as a listbox containing all date format options. The screenshot confirms the dropdown list opened and is visible on the page.
